title: Tomas and the Sad Little Dragon
synopsis: When young Tomas discovers a crying baby dragon in the enchanted forest, he learns that being brave and kind can help make new friends and solve big problems.

pages.text: Tomas loved playing in the magical forest behind his house. The trees sparkled with fairy dust, and colorful flowers sang happy songs. But today, Tomas heard something different - a sad crying sound.

illustration.description: A cheerful young boy with dark curly hair and brown skin walking through a whimsical forest with glittering trees and singing flowers in bright rainbow colors. Cartoon style with rounded shapes and textured paper background.
illustration.alt: Tomas walking through a magical forest

pages.text: Tomas felt worried. Someone was very sad! He followed the crying sound deeper into the forest, past the giggling mushrooms and the friendly talking rabbits who waved hello.

illustration.description: Tomas looking concerned with furrowed brows, walking past smiling purple mushrooms and diverse woodland animals including rabbits of different colors waving cheerfully. Bright primary colors with soft textured background.
illustration.alt: Tomas following the sad sound through the forest

pages.text: Behind a big rainbow rock, Tomas found a tiny baby dragon with beautiful green scales. The little dragon was crying big sparkly tears that turned into pretty crystals when they hit the ground.

illustration.description: A small, adorable green dragon with large expressive eyes sitting behind a colorful rock, with crystal tears falling and creating small gems on the ground. Tomas peeking around the rock with a surprised but gentle expression.
illustration.alt: Tomas discovering the crying baby dragon

pages.text: "Hello, little dragon," Tomas said softly. "Why are you so sad?" The baby dragon looked up with big, scared eyes. "I'm lost!" she sniffled. "I can't find my mama anywhere!"

illustration.description: Tomas kneeling down to talk to the small green dragon, both characters showing clear emotions - Tomas looking kind and caring, the dragon looking sad and frightened. Warm, comforting colors in cartoon style.
illustration.alt: Tomas talking gently to the scared baby dragon

pages.text: Tomas felt brave and wanted to help his new friend. "Don't be scared," he said. "I'm Tomas, and I'll help you find your mama. What's your name?" "I'm Luna," said the dragon, wiping her sparkly tears.

illustration.description: Tomas reaching out his hand to comfort Luna the dragon, both characters beginning to smile. Luna has stopped crying and looks hopeful. Bright, encouraging colors with a textured forest background.
illustration.alt: Tomas comforting Luna and introducing himself

pages.text: Tomas and Luna searched everywhere - behind the singing trees, under the rainbow bridge, and near the bubbling magic creek. Luna was getting scared again, but Tomas held her tiny claw.

illustration.description: Tomas and Luna walking together hand-in-claw through various magical locations - past colorful singing trees, over a rainbow bridge, near a sparkling creek. Both characters showing determination and friendship.
illustration.alt: Tomas and Luna searching for Luna's mama together

pages.text: Suddenly, they heard a loud, happy roar! A big, beautiful green dragon came flying down from the clouds. "Luna! My baby!" she cried. Luna was so happy she jumped up and down with joy.

illustration.description: A large, majestic green mother dragon swooping down from fluffy clouds while Luna jumps excitedly and Tomas smiles widely. All characters showing pure joy and relief with bright, celebratory colors.
illustration.alt: Mama dragon reuniting with Luna while Tomas watches happily

pages.text: "Thank you for helping my Luna," said Mama Dragon, giving Tomas a gentle hug. Tomas felt proud and happy. Luna gave him a sparkly crystal tear as a friendship gift. "We'll always be friends!" she said.

illustration.description: Mama Dragon gently hugging Tomas while Luna presents him with a beautiful glowing crystal. All three characters beaming with happiness and friendship in a warm, magical forest setting with soft golden light.
illustration.alt: The three friends celebrating their friendship with hugs and gifts

metadata.illustrationStyle: Bright, cheerful cartoon style with expressive faces. Bold primary colors. Rounded, friendly shapes. Slightly textured backgrounds like construction paper.

questions.question: How did Tomas feel when he wanted to help Luna?
questions.explanation: Tomas felt brave when he decided to help Luna find her mama, even though it was a big job for a little boy.

questions.question: What was Luna's problem?
questions.explanation: Luna was crying because she was lost and couldn't find her mama anywhere in the forest.

questions.question: What gift did Luna give Tomas?
questions.explanation: Luna gave Tomas one of her crystal tears as a friendship gift to remember their adventure together.

questions.question: How did everyone feel at the end?
questions.explanation: Everyone felt happy at the end because Luna found her mama and Tomas made new dragon friends.

pages.title: Complete the Story!
pages.text: Tomas heard a ___ sound in the forest. He found a little ___ who was crying because she was ___. Tomas felt ___ and wanted to help his new friend.

pages.title: What Happened Next?
pages.text: Luna and Tomas searched ___ for her mama. When they found her, Luna felt very ___. Mama Dragon gave Tomas a big ___ to say thank you.
